action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py has filter for valid object dirs (with input.png), handles nested PIL frames from render(), uses avg elevation/distance from target cameras.json for orbit rendering, saves RGBA 256x256 PNGs to required structure; last command failed only due to test invocation missing --checkpoint (eval harness provides it). TripoSR zero-shot + dummy checkpoint works on val subset. No LPIPS yet. Analysis: This is a strong task-aligned baseline (single-image->triplane->render matches exactly, respects size limit, no training needed, camera-aware approx reduces pose mismatch vs defaults). Full eval ~5min based on prior timing, fits budget; filter fixes the test_gt/101-object issue. Decision: Submit eval on current best.pt + predict.py immediately for initial LPIPS/PSNR/SSIM baseline and time measurement before considering fine-tuning or renderer customization.
